name: @aqa/admin
description: Admin panel for agentic-qa-kit — read-only viewer over .aqa/runs/*.

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; for (const p of ['dist','.tsbuildinfo','node_modules/.vite']) { try { rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch {} }"
